title: DittoBench MinerResponse
description: JSON payload the miner harness writes to stdout, one per challenge, in request order. Mirrors bittensor.MinerResponse in go/bittensor/types.go.

miner_hotkey.description: SS58-encoded miner hotkey (optional but recommended for auditing).

validator_seed.description: Must equal ChallengeRequest.validator_seed. Lost or duplicated seeds are protocol violations.

tool_calls.description: Tool-call trace for ditto_core challenges. Order matters; each call records the 1-indexed hop.

args.description: Raw JSON arguments exactly as the underlying LLM produced them; the validator parses.

evidence_ids.description: Ranked evidence pair IDs for ditto_retrieval challenges; best first.

final_answer.description: Optional grounded answer; required when ChallengeRequest.include_answer is true.

tool_score.description: Optional harness-provided tool-call scoring envelope. Validators are not required to trust this; production validators recompute from tool_calls. Present only as a fast-path for the contributor stub runner.

retrieval_score.description: Optional harness-provided retrieval IR envelope. Same trust caveat as tool_score.

refusal.description: Structured refusal signal. When set, the validator scores zero for this case only and does not penalise other mechanisms.
